memoryArtifacts.description: Crest of name Stanley showing noble ancestry, and shared Scottish noble crest deer design.
Crest of name Calder, Thanes of Calder. With shared Scottish crests deer design. With ancient United Kingdom and Danish leaf mantle and helmet designs.

zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Stanley於大約1330年出生在英國英格蘭爾斯托雷頓時，他的父親Sir John de Stanley40歲，母親Mabel Mabella Hawkset42歲。他於1350年與Alice Massey在英國爾丁培利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1398年在英國爾胡頓享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Stanley于大约1330年出生在英国英格兰爾斯托雷頓时，他的父亲Sir John de Stanley40岁，母亲Mabel Mabella Hawkset42岁。他于1350年与Alice Massey在英国爾丁培利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1398年在英国爾胡頓享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Stanley was born about 1330, in Storeton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John de Stanley, was 40 and his mother, Mabel Mabella Hawkset, was 42. He married Alice Massey in 1350, in Timperley, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1398, in Hooton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Stanley est né environ 1330, à Storeton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Stanley, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mabel Mabella Hawkset, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Alice Massey en 1350, à Timperley, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1398, à Hooton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Stanley um 1330 in Storeton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Stanley 40 und seine Mutter Mabel Mabella Hawkset 42. Er hat 1350 in Timperley, Cheshire, England Alice Massey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1398 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Hooton, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Stanley è nato il circa 1330 nel Storeton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John de Stanley, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Mabel Mabella Hawkset, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Alice Massey nel 1350, nel Timperley, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1398, nel Hooton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Stanleyが約1330年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストーレトンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Stanleyは40歳，母Mabel Mabella Hawksetは42歳であった。1350年にイギリスチェシュアイアティンペルリーでAlice Masseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1398年にイギリスチェシュアイアホーオトンで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Stanley(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스토레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Stanley(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel Mabella Hawkset(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1350년 영국 체실르 팀피를리에서 Alice Massey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1398년 영국 체실르 후턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Stanley nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Stanley, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mabel Mabella Hawkset, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Massey em 1350, em Timperley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1398, em Hooton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Stanley родился около 1330 г. в местности сторетон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John de Stanley было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel Mabella Hawkset, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Massey в 1350 г. в местности тимпирли, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1398 г. в местности хутон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Stanley nació aproximadamente 1330, en Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Stanley, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mabel Mabella Hawkset, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Alice Massey en 1350, en Timperley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1398, en Hooton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
